case_title: TAMIKA BRANNER VS. REARDON HEIGHTS ASSOCIATES, L.P.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-05-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-05-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF TAMIKA BRANNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REARDON HEIGHTS ASSOCIATES, L.P. REPRESENTED BY AGEN FOR OWNER RONALD MURSICK IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $85. SERVED SEP-27-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT REARDON HEIGHTS ASSOCIATES, L.P.
